releases.title: collectZ v3.16.17
releases.summary: This patch refines sidebar navigation feedback so hover and active states use compact blue underlines instead of gray row highlighting.

details.heading: Highlights
bullets: Removed muted gray hover backgrounds from sidebar navigation items.
Added a muted blue hover/focus underline that appears only under the hovered or focused item.
Shortened sidebar underlines so they read closer to the label width instead of spanning the full nav row.
Kept active selected items on a solid blue underline.
Preserved the collapsed-rail active indicator for grouped Library and Platform navigation.
Updated unit coverage for the hover underline contract.

releases.title: collectZ v3.16.16
releases.summary: This patch replaces the heavy sidebar active highlight with a quieter blue underline that matches the app's tab selection language.

details.heading: Highlights
bullets: Replaced the large raised active block on sidebar nav items with a compact blue underline.
Kept selected nav text readable without changing routes or permissions.
Kept Library and Platform parent rows calm while visible child rows own the selected underline.
Preserved a collapsed-rail indicator for grouped Library and Platform navigation.
Updated browser and unit coverage for the new sidebar active-state contract.

releases.title: collectZ v3.16.15
releases.summary: This patch cleans up the Workspace sidebar by keeping primary library categories together and moving Loans, Review, and Wishlist into a separated Library utility group.

details.heading: Highlights
bullets: Moved `Loans` below the primary library category list.
Renamed the visible `Merge Review` sidebar entry to `Review`.
Moved `Review` into the Library section instead of showing it as a separate Workspace item.
Kept the existing Merge Review route and page behavior.
Kept `Wishlist` in the separated Library utility group.
Kept `Import`, `Help`, and `Settings` as direct Workspace navigation items.
Updated browser and unit coverage for the new navigation structure.

releases.title: collectZ v3.16.14
releases.summary: This patch treats Capture Inbox as an intake workflow instead of a Library category by moving its entry point under Import.

details.heading: Highlights
bullets: Removed `Capture Inbox` from the Library navigation list.
Kept `Wishlist` in Library.
Added `Capture Inbox` as a first-class tab on the Import surface.
Kept existing Capture Inbox routes and deep links working.
Made the `Import` navigation item stay active when Capture Inbox is open.
Updated browser and unit coverage for the new Import-owned Capture entry point.

releases.title: collectZ v3.16.13
releases.summary: This patch keeps the Workspace and Platform split moving in the right direction by removing the old collapsible Workspace navigation group and making Help versus Help Admin clearer.

details.heading: Highlights
bullets: Removed the collapsible `Workspace` navigation item.
Promoted workspace `Settings` and `Merge Review` to direct Workspace-mode navigation links.
Kept normal users in `Help` from the Workspace menu.
Moved `Help Admin` into the platform/support navigation context instead of showing it as a Workspace item.
Updated browser and unit coverage so the sidebar contract expects the flattened Workspace links and platform-scoped Help Admin behavior.

releases.title: collectZ v3.16.12
releases.summary: This patch removes the redundant Workspace overview block so Workspace opens directly on the settings sections that users can act on.

details.heading: Highlights
bullets: Removed the large Workspace name, role, library, accessible workspace count, and visible library count block from the Workspace settings surface.
Removed the old in-page workspace selector from Workspace settings.
Kept workspace switching in the profile menu, where the app now treats Workspace and Platform as explicit contexts.
Kept Workspace Settings, Backup, Export, Integrations, People, and Activity tabs unchanged.
Updated browser coverage so it expects the useful Workspace sections instead of the old overview header.

releases.title: collectZ v3.16.11
releases.summary: This patch separates workspace backup readback from workspace export actions and shortens the Workspace navigation label to `Settings`.

details.heading: Highlights
bullets: Renamed the Workspace navigation child item from `Settings & integrations` to `Settings`.
Kept Workspace Integrations as its own workspace tab.
Moved workspace backup readback into a dedicated `Backup` tab.
Moved workspace export downloads and coverage into a dedicated `Export` tab.
Removed backup/export readback from the general Workspace Settings tab.
Kept the existing workspace portability API and export behavior unchanged.

releases.title: collectZ v3.16.10
releases.summary: This patch shortens the profile-menu Workspace/Platform context switch labels.

details.heading: Highlights
bullets: Changed the profile-menu context action from `Switch to Workspace` / `Switch to Platform` to `Workspace` / `Platform`.
Kept the `Working in` readback so the menu still explains the current context.
Kept the Workspace/Platform switching behavior unchanged.
Updated browser and source-contract coverage for the shorter labels.

releases.title: collectZ v3.16.9
releases.summary: This patch moves the Workspace/Platform context switch out of the main navigation body and into the profile menu.

details.heading: Highlights
bullets: Removed the permanent Workspace/Platform segmented switch from the sidebar navigation body.
Added current-context readback to the profile menu for platform admins.
Added a profile-menu action to switch between Workspace and Platform contexts.
Kept the existing Workspace and Platform navigation separation unchanged after switching.
Updated browser coverage so the sidebar starts with navigation and the profile menu owns context switching.

releases.title: collectZ v3.16.8
releases.summary: This patch applies the compact navigation menu top-row treatment to the expanded desktop sidebar as well as the mobile navigation menu.

details.heading: Highlights
bullets: Removed the desktop-only padding and icon-size overrides that kept the top navigation row tall.
Kept the desktop `collectZ` wordmark visible, but inside the same compact row.
Kept the mobile menu top row compact from `3.16.7`.
Added desktop-width browser coverage so the expanded sidebar top row cannot silently grow back.
